image_label: test1 - Turkish villa 100 m2 (2+1), single-story plan

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner of the whole footprint (incl. veranda). x east, y north. Drawing dimensions are in cm; coordinates below converted to m (e.g. 900 cm = 9.00 m). Total outer footprint ~9.00 (x) x 11.12 (y) m; bottom 2.50 m band is the covered veranda.

strokes.note: south wall of heated block (living / veranda boundary). Carries two large 200/190 windows to the veranda (S15,S16). No door symbol on this wall -> not healed.
north perimeter wall (top). Carries two 120/120 windows (bedroom1 S18, bedroom2 S19).
west perimeter wall. Carries 120/120 window (bedroom1 S17).
east perimeter wall. Carries 60/40 (Banyo S20) + 120/110 (kitchen S21) windows.
veranda south edge (drawn as low wall/railing between corner posts). Phase2 decides thermal role (covered terrace, likely unconditioned).
veranda west edge (railing/low wall).
veranda east edge (railing/low wall).

horizontal partition separating living space (below, Yasama Mekani) from the upper rooms. Healed door opening at x~=4.7 (hall->living swing arc); EP wall continuous. MEDIUM confidence on y (=2.50+4.48 west dim chain).
south wall of bedroom1 (left). MEDIUM confidence. Healed door opening at x~=3.6 (bedroom1->hall arc).
vertical partition between bedroom1 (+wardrobes) west and the central hall/bedroom2 zone. MEDIUM confidence on x (=4.35 from top 435 dim).
south wall of bedroom2 / wardrobe band. LOW-MEDIUM confidence. Double-door arcs (hall<->bedroom2) on this run -> healed door opening at x~=5.3.
vertical partition west side of the bathroom block (Banyo + top-right bath/tub). MEDIUM confidence on x.
horizontal partition between Banyo (below ~5.5 m2) and top-right bathroom with tub (above). MEDIUM confidence (east dim chain 181 band).
south wall of Banyo (separating from living). Healed door opening at x~=6.6 (banyo door arc). MEDIUM confidence.
living south window to veranda; size label 200/190 cm (w/h). World-z unknown (plan-only drawing, no elevation) -> z absent. On parent wall S1.
living south window to veranda; size label 200/190 cm. World-z unknown. On parent wall S1.
bedroom1 west window; size label 120/120 cm. World-z unknown. On parent wall S3.
bedroom1 north window; size label 120/120 cm. World-z unknown. On parent wall S2.
bedroom2 north window; size label 120/120 cm. World-z unknown. On parent wall S2.
Banyo small east window; size label 60/40 cm. World-z unknown. On parent wall S4.
kitchen east window; size label 120/110 cm. World-z unknown. On parent wall S4.

dimensions.note: top sub-chain left (cm); note 435+485=920 vs 900 total — drawing's own rounding, transcribed verbatim

ocr_texts.note: washing machine label (in Banyo); equipment text
title block: total area + room program

unknowns_noted: wall thickness not used -> all thickness_m = null
window sill/head world-z unknowable from a plan-only drawing (no elevation supplied) -> windows traced as plan position + size label only; z must come from phase2/elevation, left absent
exact interior partition coordinates (S8-S14) are MEDIUM/LOW confidence: derived from room areas + the L/R dimension sub-chains, not from explicit interior dim chains
drawing units are cm; converted to m for coordinates; dimension text kept verbatim
uncaptured_visual_elements: FURNITURE excluded: bedroom1 double bed + 2 wardrobes (hatched verticals); bedroom2 desk+chair; living 2 sofas + armchairs + coffee table + dining table with 3 chairs; kitchen counter/cabinets; veranda 2 lounge chairs + round table (~15+ furniture symbols)
SANITARY excluded: Banyo sink, toilet, shower tray; top-right bathroom tub + shower
EQUIPMENT excluded: washing machine (Camasir Mak.), stove/cooktop, sink, fridge (kitchen)
FLOOR-FINISH excluded: beige interior floor fill (all rooms), veranda checkerboard tile paving fill
DECORATION excluded: potted plant symbol in living

HEALED DOORS (4): hall->living (S8, x~=4.7); bedroom1->hall (S9, x~=3.6); hall<->bedroom2 double-door (S11, x~=5.3); Banyo door (S14, x~=6.6) — all door swing arcs, healed into continuous walls, not traced as pens
WINDOW z: windows S15-S21 captured at plan position with their NNN/NNN size labels in notes; vertical placement (sill/head) absent because no elevation is supplied in this plan-only test
